SQLITE_VERSION.description: Specific version of sqlite to install. Can be a numeric version or an alias.

SQLITE_INSTALL_METHOD.description: How to install SQLITE. 'system' uses the native OS package manager, 'source' compiles/downloads binaries.

LIBSCRIPT_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Global unix socket to listen on

SQLITE_LISTEN_PORT.description: Port for SQLITE to listen on

SQLITE_LISTEN_ADDRESS.description: Address for SQLITE to listen on

SQLITE_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Unix socket for SQLITE to listen on
